title: • Better crm
content:
• Better crm
  • Add funded deals an info in Zoho for 2024 deals
  • Zoho backdate old deals from 2023 with funded information
  • Tweak zapper and test
  • Manychat.com
  • Try to automate a follow up text after application has been signed informing them an additional email asking for banks has just been sent
  • Figure out callback date reminders in zoho for follow ups in renewals in calander
  • Check out Zoho text service
  • Make $250,000 in overall company revenue
  • Zapier set up that email gets sent after application is sent not at same time.


    • Automation example
    Get Lead -> Application sent->After signed email requesting banks gets sent-> After that text gets sent say “Hi it’s John from etc etc


    “It would be cool to set up a system that once we get a lead the applications get automatically sent out and then once the applications get automatically sent out an email it automatically sent out sending them to bank statement request and then once that's done a text message gets automatically sent out saying hi it's John from Forward Funders. I received your funding request and I just sent you over an application in the bank statement request.”
